backward_compatibility.rationale: Existing /contexts/ URLs must keep working — new shorthand routes added as aliases (Q1, Q6)

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Dead code policy — cosmetic ContentTypeFilter on CollectionsPage deleted per Q2

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous panel approval (GOV-OPTIONS-APPROVED) — best isolation/DRY balance, zero routing infra changes, 3 immediate consumers justify abstraction
